content.en:
Break the abyss.

The Lord of the Ancient and other Supremes were struggling to stop the Destroyers at this time, and the number of Destroyers had changed from two to nine now.

The Nine Great Destruction Kings had indeed brought tremendous pressure to the Supreme Lords such as the Lord of the Yuan Ancients.

Still, they can withstand it.

"Let's divide the battlefield!"

The Lord of the Ancient suddenly proposed.

"Divide the battlefield?"

The Golden Light Supreme was stunned at first, but quickly guessed the plan of the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

"Lord of the Ancient Ages, are you going to let those weaker Destruction Creatures go, and only stop the Nine Destruction Kings and a few top-level Supreme Destruction Creatures?"

The Golden Light Supreme asked.

"That's good!" The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded: "There are too many destructive creatures here, and if you stop them all, it will be unrealistic at all." The Abyss of Destruction is completely the place where the dark energy of the universe gathers, where there are many destructive creatures that are breeding all the time, and I don't know how many destructive creatures have been born for a long time, and it is impossible to kill them. If we intercept them all, we'll all run out of energy and die. Therefore, we must divide the battlefield and destroy the abyss, and we will stop these Destruction Kings and the top supreme destruction creatures. Outside the Abyss of Destruction, it can be divided into three major battlefields - the supreme-level battlefield, the dominant-level battlefield, and the cosmic god battlefield. All supreme-level or celestial-level creatures are all intercepted on the supreme-level battlefield, and other destructive creatures are let go. And the Juggernaut battlefield stops the Juggernaut destroyer. As for the Cosmic God Battlefield, stop all the remaining creatures that are destroyed. In this way, the battlefield can be divided layer by layer, and the destruction of creatures can be truly blocked. In addition, we also let some supreme level who are proficient in the formation formation set up at the entrance of the Abyss of Destruction until the day when the Abyss of Destruction is completely sealed. "

"Okay, that's it!"

The Golden Light Supreme and other supremes responded.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes passed on the plan of dividing the battlefield to the supremes of the outside world.

And these supremes gradually passed on to the masters and the cosmic gods, and told the plan to divide the battlefield.

......

"Divide the battlefield!"

Ye Tian received the news and knew the plan to divide the battlefield, and he also felt that this plan was good.

In today's situation, dividing the battlefield is a more reasonable way to fight, otherwise if the supremes are under too much pressure, once the supremes collapse, they will really be defeated.

But in this way, the pressure on the cosmic gods is greater.

Because once the Differentiation Battlefield Plan begins, there will be more cosmic god-level destructive creatures rushing out, and those cosmic god-level destructive creatures can only be solved by the cosmic gods, and the supremes and masters will not make a move.

Ye Tian didn't react, but the faces of the other universe gods changed drastically, and the pressure doubled.

After the Seven Sword Divine Lord learned the news, he frowned and said, "Divide the battlefield, I'm afraid the pressure will be several times greater! The universe god in the sky is destroying creatures and attacking, I don't know how many universe gods will die!"

Immediately, several people looked at Ye Tian and immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

Fortunately, they have Ye Tian, otherwise several of them would have been terrified at this moment.

"I'll try my best to kill the cosmic gods and destroy creatures, and if you can't stop it, get close to me!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Thank you, Lord Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Seven Sword Divine Lord and the other four hurriedly thanked.

A few days later, a large number of cosmic god-level destructive creatures rushed over and fought with a large number of cosmic gods.

Although some cosmic gods are indeed very rebellious and terrifying, and can fight a large number of cosmic gods to destroy creatures with their own strength, there are still many cosmic gods who are surrounded and killed by many cosmic gods destroying creatures.

Almost every day, a large number of cosmic gods fall and die, including some of the cosmic gods of the human race.

And Ye Tian's five-person team didn't have much pressure, although he encountered many times more cosmic god destruction creatures, he didn't encounter a single dominant-level destruction creature.

Therefore, with Ye Tian's combat strength, he could basically protect the other four people and ensure that nothing would happen to them.

On the other side of the battlefield of the Cosmic God.

A few cosmic gods lightly destroyed batches of cosmic god destruction creatures, and they were the sons of the epoch of the twelve cosmic epochs.

Under the orders of the Lord of the Ancient Ages, they, the sons of the era and the Supreme Highness, also came to the cosmic god battlefield to strangle and destroy the creatures.

Time passed slowly, and half a year passed in a blink of an eye.

Terran, Holy City.

On a huge screen, dense names disappeared one by one.

Countless people were watching the screen, watching the names disappear on it, and they were all very touched.

These names are all the names of the powerhouses at the peak of the cosmic god and above, and once they fall, they will be known and disappear from the screen, and the names on this screen are all the Terran powerhouses who participated in the war this time.

The screen is divided into three areas, one area is the name of the Supreme and Celestial Venerable, one area is the name of the Lord, and one area is the name of the cosmic god.

And the names of the gods of the universe are undoubtedly the most!

In the crowd, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu were also in the crowd.

Although the two of them are also the peak powerhouses of the cosmic gods, they did not participate in the war, which is naturally Ye Tian's struggle, and the price is that Ye Tian must participate in the war.

Fortunately, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu were relatively low-key and did not have many records, so they were lucky not to be dispatched.

At this moment, they couldn't help but sigh when they saw so many cosmic gods falling.

Suddenly.

Countless people in the crowd screamed and stared at the first area, on which the name of one person disappeared.

"Oh my God, the name of Qingfeng Tianzun is gone!"

"That's the Heavenly Venerable, how could it have fallen? Qingfeng Heavenly Venerable is one of the oldest supremes of the human race, one of the seventy-eight great beings who once existed!"

"This war is too terrible, I didn't expect even Tianzun to fall!"

Countless people sighed, and many people were worried.

Terran Sanctuary, Qingfeng City.

Qingfeng Tianzun, as the city lord of Qingfeng City, his fall made the entire Qingfeng City covered with a layer of haze, and countless people wept.

And Qingfeng Tianzun is not the only Tianzun that has fallen, there have also fallen two Tianzun before, but it is a new Tianzun who has recently been promoted by the human race, and Qingfeng Tianzun is the top Tianzun, second only to the Supreme.

Today, the Terrans have fallen three Heavenly Venerables.

And looking at the entire universe, Tianzun doesn't know how many have fallen, and even the Supreme has fallen hundreds.

The only fortunate thing is that the supreme of the human race has not yet fallen.

After several months of hard fighting, the Supremes finally arranged a large number of divine arrays at the entrance of the Abyss of Destruction, although they had not completely sealed the Abyss of Destruction, but they stopped many of the destructive creatures, so that the number of destructive creatures rushing out was reduced a lot.

This kind of achievement has made the three major battlefields much easier, especially the Cosmic God Battlefield, which has reduced the pressure several times.
